title: SigNoz Alert
description: Schema representing an alert rule in the SigNoz observability platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the alert rule.

name.description: Human-readable name of the alert rule.

description.description: Detailed description of what the alert monitors.

condition.description: Alert condition definition including thresholds and query.

compositeQuery.description: Composite query definition for evaluating the alert condition.

target.description: Threshold value for the alert condition.

frequency.description: How often the alert condition is evaluated.

labels.description: Key-value label pairs attached to the alert.

annotations.description: Key-value annotation pairs for the alert.

channels.description: Notification channel IDs where alerts are sent.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the alert was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the alert was last updated.
